# Codebase Architecture Instructions

## Overview

This project follows the architecture documented in `../../docs/architecture/codebase-architecture.md`. Please refer to this comprehensive architecture guide when working on the codebase.

## Key Architectural Principles

- Follow service-oriented architecture patterns
- Maintain clear separation of concerns between layers
- Use dependency injection for loose coupling
- Implement the command pattern for operations
- Ensure interface-driven development

## Quick Reference

For detailed information about:

- System architecture and component organization
- Design patterns and implementation guidelines
- Service boundaries and responsibilities
- Performance and security considerations

Refer to: `/docs/architecture/codebase-architecture.md`
